violations.text: The slicer grip was observed in poor repair (worn down spikes). The grip must be maintained in good repair and proper adjustment. Per PIC, new grip has been ordered and is pending delivery. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2025
Prepared (TCS foods) that are packaged on-site are lacking expiration dates. Foods made on-site shall be disposed of within 7 days of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2025
